slt_items.title: Beadwork & Jewelry
slt_items.description: Our students master the craftsmanship of traditional jewelry using black, white, red, yellow, and blue seed beads to mirror ancestral Blaan designs.

slt_items.title: Dad Dwata Music
slt_items.description: Mastering the Faglong (two-stringed lute) and Agong (brass gongs) to echo the heartbeat of our tribe.

slt_items.title: Maral Dance
slt_items.description: Grace and storytelling through movement. Our students perform traditional dances for community rituals.

elders_wisdom.description: Knowledge in the Blaan tribe is a gift passed from the Fulong (elders) to the youth. We document oral histories to ensure no story is forgotten.
elders_wisdom.quote: We do not inherit the land from our ancestors; we borrow it from our children.
elders_wisdom.author: Blaan Proverb
